mapper.sql: message_id, order_id, sender_id, sender_name, content, message_type, image_url, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into biz_backpacker_chat_message (order_id, sender_id, sender_name, content, message_type, image_url, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{imageUrl}, #{createTime})
